responses: Hello! Welcome to our Adarsh Garments Menswear Retail Store. How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I help you find today?
Hey! Great to see you. How can I assist you with your shopping?
We are open from 9:30 AM to 9:30 PM every day!

patterns: where is the location of your store or shop?
responses: Our Store Location is Shop no. 44 Gurudwara Market Opp. Naval Cinema, G.T Road Panipat-132103
Goodbye! Thanks for stopping by. Have a great day!
See you later! Feel free to reach back out if you need anything else.
Bye! Happy shopping, hope to see you again soon.

patterns: I haven't received my order yet
responses: To check your delivery status, please contact Mr. Sovala at +91856932145  with your 5-digit Order ID. He will help you out immediately!
Changed your mind about the size or fit? No problem! Please enter your 5-digit Order ID (e.g., AG-12345) so I can initiate the exchange workflow.
We offer a 30-day exchange and return policy. Please type your 5-digit Order ID here to start your request immediately.
If your item arrived damaged or you need an immediate swap, please type your Order ID here, or contact us at adarshgarments.376@gmail.com.

patterns: Do you have this in size medium?
Are there any left of this product?
responses: Please provide the product name or SKU link, and I will check our real-time inventory for you and Mr. Sovala will connect you through mail!
Inventory levels change quickly! If you give me the product details and your preferred size/color, I can check availability and Mr. Sovala will connect with you through mail.
If an item is out of stock, we will notify you through mail at the moment it drops back into inventory.

patterns: Can I pay with PayPal,Paytm or Google Pay?
What payment methods do you take?
responses: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX), PayPal, and Apple Pay.
If your payment failed, please verify your billing address matches your card details, or try checking out with an alternative method like PayPal.
We support secure transactions via major debit/credit cards, PayPal, and digital wallets.

patterns: I made a mistake, cancel it
responses: I can certainly help you request a cancellation! To pull up your file details, could you please provide your 5-digit Order ID (e.g., AG-12345)?

patterns: Is there a sale going on?
responses: You can visit our instagram page Adarsh.garments and follow and get upto 10% discount on your purchasing greater than Rs.1000 !
